chapters.title: Welcome to C++
chapters.description: Start your journey. Learn to print output and run your first program.

chapters.title: Variables & Data
chapters.description: Store data in memory using variables and different data types.

chapters.title: Operators & Input
chapters.description: Perform math, compare values, and take input from the user.

chapters.title: Control Flow
chapters.description: Make decisions in your code using if/else statements and switches.

chapters.title: Loops
chapters.description: Automate repetitive tasks with while, do-while, and for loops.

chapters.title: Arrays & Strings
chapters.description: Store multiple items and manipulate text in your programs.

chapters.title: Functions
chapters.description: Write reusable blocks of code to keep your programs organized.

chapters.title: Pointers & References
chapters.description: Unlock C++ superpowers by accessing and manipulating memory directly.

chapters.title: Structs & Enums
chapters.description: Group related data together to build complex data structures.

chapters.title: Intro to OOP
chapters.description: Model real-world objects using Classes and Objects in C++.
